projects.title: Arngren
projects.description: A modernized and user-friendly redesign of the eclectic Norwegian website, Arngren.
projects.about:
This project was created by me and my team, Lowkey, consisting of four members. It is a product of our university course, Web-based System Development. We've revamped the original Arngren website, enhancing its design and functionality to provide a better user experience.

For more details, visit the original Arngren website.

projects.title: Health Diary App
projects.description: A simple BMI and health tracking Java application.
projects.about: This Health Diary App is a project for our university course, Java Programming. The app allows users to calculate their BMI, save records, and track their BMI history over time.

projects.title: Uniflea
projects.about: University Flea Market Web Application(UniFlea) is an web-based University Flea market created specifically for universities. Me and my team, called Sleepy Flea, designed and built the website to address a problem brought up by our client, a third-year undergraduate student who has to move every semester due to a lack of available dorm rooms. She found it difficult to buy and sell everyday essentials and electronics when she has to move. This inspired her to create an online marketplace where university community members could buy and sell used items to facilitate the moving process. UniFlea serves as a marketplace, where students, employees, professors, and lecturers can sell, rent, exchange, and share their items

projects.title: PANAISpeak
projects.description: An educational web application integrating a fine-tuned Whisper model for speech recognition.
projects.about: PANAISpeak is the product of my final year project (FYP). This educational web application integrates a fine-tuned Whisper model, which has been specifically fine-tuned with a collected dataset of Malaysian children aged 4 to 7. The goal is to provide an effective learning experience for Malaysian children, enhancing their educational journey through advanced speech recognition technology.

experiences.title: Software Engineer II
experiences.content:
[ MomentsAI ] End-to-End Ownership: Only developer responsible for the full lifecycle of the platform, moving from a local CLI tool to a production-ready AI video service.
Infrastructure Migration: Independently transitioned AI inference workloads from local CPU environments to Akamai Linode GPU nodes (CUDA), enabling high-concurrency video processing for viral content generation.
AI Pipeline Engineering: Developed a unified "speech-to-face" synchronization pipeline by orchestrating Whisper-1, Pyannote, and Buffalo_L for automated diarization and face recognition.
Queue Management: Used BullMQ and Redis to handle asynchronous video rendering, preventing system timeouts during heavy media processing.

experiences.title: Software Engineer I
experiences.content:
[ RewardsFX ] Sole Backend Architect: Owned the full implementation of the RewardsFX backend, refining an initial roadmap into a high-scale reactive loop using DynamoDB Streams.
Reactive Loop Design: Refined the initial project roadmap into a fully decoupled system using EventBridge → Lambda → DynamoDB Streams. This allows 12+ services to react to data changes without blocking each other.
Cost Optimization: Reduced AWS costs and latency by connecting API Gateway directly to EventBridge, cutting out unnecessary Lambda executions for event routing.
Idempotency & Data Integrity: Developed a reusable Lambda Layer for distributed idempotency, guaranteeing 100% transaction accuracy across multiple reward types and ledger systems.
DB Performance: Optimized DynamoDB using GSI/LSI indexes, eliminating table scans and achieving sub-second response times for high-traffic lookups.
Collaboration: Led technical discussions with other department leads to align the backend architecture with business requirements.

experiences.title: Software Engineer I
experiences.content:
[ Fusion Studio ] Asset Automation: Extended the Laravel backend to support Adobe Animate assets; wrote logic to automate ZIP parsing and tracking script injection.
Interactive Formats: Built and deployed interactive ad templates using Inertia.js and Vue 3.

experiences.company: Datasonic Smart Solutions Sdn Bhd (Subsidiary of NexG)
experiences.title: Software Engineer (Part-Time & Intern)
experiences.content:
[ PERKESO ARTs ] Project Kick-off (PERKESO): Started the development of the ARTs platform from scratch, setting up the initial .NET Core project structure and backend logic.
Security & Auth: Built the login system using JWT and a Singleton-pattern OTP engine to manage secure, consistent token generation.
Full-Stack Development: Translated Figma designs into responsive components using Quasar (Vue.js) and integrated them with .NET Core APIs.
Consultation: Participated in design sessions with the Lead Engineer and external developers to finalize API specs and security standards.

experiences.company: Datasonic Smart Solutions Sdn Bhd (Subsidiary of NexG)
experiences.title: Software Engineer (Part-Time & Intern)
experiences.content: [ i-KAD ] Database Management: Managed schemas and wrote optimized queries in MySQL to handle large-scale government records for the i-KAD system.

achievements.title: Senior Category Champion • Global Nominee - NASA Space Apps Sarawak 2023 Hackathon
achievements.content:
My team, MakeItReal, and I proudly participated in the NASA Space Apps Sarawak 2023 Hackathon organized by the Ministry of Education, Innovation and Talent Development (MEITD). It was launched on Friday, 6 October, at 8.30pm. The event commenced at 9pm the same day and continued non-stop until 9pm on Sunday, October 8. For this hackathon, we selected the challenge 'A Marketplace for Open Science Projects.' To meet the objectives of this challenge, we developed the OPENHUB web application. OPENHUB serves as a platform to connect researchers, developers, and enthusiasts, enabling them to collaborate on open science projects effectively.

Team Details: MakeItReal

achievements.title: King's Scout Award
achievements.content: The King's Scout Award is the highest award of the Scouts Association of Malaysia (PPM). I was honored to receive this prestigious award, issued by the Scouts Association of Malaysia on 4th May 2019. The certificate is signed by His Majesty the Yang di-Pertuan Agong of Malaysia and all the sultans in Malaysia. To earn this award, I successfully completed the King's Scout Rating Test Camp (King's Scout Assessment Camp) from 20 July 2017 to 22 July 2017, a rigorous 4-day, 3-night camp organized by the respective State King's Scout Evaluation Council.

achievements.title: Bronze Medal - Kangaroo Math Competition (KMC)
achievements.content: I participated in the Kangaroo Math Competition (KMC) on 14th March 2019, a renowned international math competition. The competition ranks the top 10% of participants in each category as MEDALISTS, awarding Gold, Silver, and Bronze medals. I was honored to be among the top participants and to have achieved recognition in this prestigious event.
